sys_check.name: System Status Check
sys_check.description: Verifies the health of the AILCC workspace and agent connectivity.

make_visual.name: Grapher Agent (Visualizer)
make_visual.description: Converts Markdown math equations into generic shader/graph code.

notify_mobile.name: iOS Notification
notify_mobile.description: Sends a push notification to the user's mobile device via Shortcuts/iCloud.

kill_all.name: Emergency Kill Switch
kill_all.description: Immediately stops all running python agent processes.

migrate_junk.name: Junk Migrator
migrate_junk.description: Moves tagged archive/junk folders to external storage.

launch_cc.name: Launch Command Center
launch_cc.description: Opens the standard Command Center browser tabs (Google, Perplexity, Localhost).
